scripts.build:web: npm --workspace @desktopcal/shared run build && npm --workspace @desktopcal/web run build
scripts.build: npm --workspace @desktopcal/shared run build && npm --workspace @desktopcal/web run build && npm --workspace @desktopcal/desktop run tauri:build
